## Summary

## Dataset Record Checklist

- [ ] Public data landing page is provided.
- [ ] Dataset is hosted outside this website repository.
- [ ] License and citation are explicit.
- [ ] Variables, units, shapes, and phase convention are documented.
- [ ] Grid and coordinate information are documented.
- [ ] Solver-specific binary files include reading instructions.
- [ ] Preview figure is included.
- [ ] Metadata JSON validates against the automated precheck or the failure is explained below.
- [ ] A maintainer can reproduce at least one sample read using the documented loader.
- [ ] I understand that automation is a precheck and maintainers make the final inclusion decision.
